title: English credits of the movies
wikitext:
[]: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Sep 21, 2017 11:04 am Are the credits for the movie available in english somewhere? In both the not so legal copies I have on my PC and in my BDs they are in Japanese, and I would like to know exactly who made what in the movies.

[]: Re: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Sep 21, 2017 11:19 am You can try reading the usual hilariously emaciated print on the back of the DVD/BD box (assuming you have a Western version).

[]: Re: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Sep 21, 2017 1:52 pm The BD I own credits just the original staff, and only key staff, for 1.11 and 2.22. No credits for 3.33.

[]: Re: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Sep 21, 2017 5:31 pm Credits on my UK boxes; you may wish to download to enlarge your view: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 21, 2017 10:54 pm I could OCR the Japanese credits if anyone wants to try converting them. Would be a nice addition to the wiki.

[]: Re: English credits of the movies             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Sep 22, 2017 2:12 pm pwhodges wrote: Credits on my UK boxes; you may wish to download to enlarge your view: SPOILER: Show
